headline: Realty Income: A Generational Opportunity In Disguise
summary: Realty Income Corporation is rated Buy as private capital pivot and joint ventures drive robust growth & strategic flexibility. Read more on O stock here.

headline: Springer Nature Shares Recover Some Ground on Upbeat Outlook
summary: Shares climbed 8.4% in morning trading after the Frankfurt-listed academic publisher said it expects further sales growth and a fatter profit margin this year.
